subcodes.first_line: For what purpose were the world and its peoples created? For the recognition of the Ancient Lord. For what purpose did the Sun rise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم و امم از برای چه خلق شد از برای عرفان مالک قدم آفتاب از برای چه مشرق تا
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @business; financial; property matters, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consultation, @wisdom [hikmat], @prayer for prosperity
